benchmark_result.review_text: My husband and I both sold and purchased a home simultaneously. We could not have navigated through the legal side of things without the help of Shannon Wynn and staff. Wynn at Law was with us every step of the way, with ease and genuine concern. They were always available for any questions/concerns we had and they responded very quickly. We recommend Wynn at Law for expertise, vast legal knowledge, and a commitment to their clientele that is rare to find today.

benchmark_result.review_text: 4.5 Star Rating! I hired Attorney Mehlos to help me fight a battery charge. Corey helped me through the worst year of my life. From day 1, Attorney Mehlos and I came up with a plan and continued to refine our strategy until the prosecutor dismissed the battery charge. It took 12 months to get it done. Attorney Mehlos was confident and prepared to win at trial. The prosecutor eventually released knowing he'd have a tough case. I highly recommend Attorney Mehlos for any criminal case.

…with an absolute domination in the court room. I was found not guilty and cleared overwhelmingly on all charges. This m…

benchmark_result.review_text: In January of 2023, after a 26 year untarnished and successful career as a firefighter/paramedic, I was falsely accused and arrested. My wife received a recommendation to call attorney Corey Mehlos. That decision turned out to be the one that saved my life both literally and figuratively. The passion, professionalism, determination, dedication and commitment not just from Corey, but his entire staff is second to none. He never gave up on me or my family and after nearly 3 long years, his tireless work ended with an absolute domination in the court room. I was found not guilty and cleared overwhelmingly on all charges. This man is the absolute definition of what a defense attorney should be.

disagreements.detail: Deterministic tagged 'empathy_support' as 'positive' via phrase 'saved my life'. AI did not tag this theme.

benchmark_result.review_text: I truly wonder if other Black people had great experiences here. They accepted thousands of dollars but never really did anything towards my son's appeal, never really fought. The case was transferred multiple times. They never even really had meetings with me or my son. Truly horrible.
